title: The Cliff: A Metal-Poor Little Red Dot Hosting an Overmassive Black Hole at $z = 3.55$
summary: JWST has revealed a large population of massive black holes (BHs) in the early Universe with unusual properties which mark them as distinct from low-redshift active galactic nuclei. Such findings have prompted the development of new models of BH formation and growth, and of their co-evolution with host galaxies. Linking the gas-phase metallicity of BH environments to seed masses is key to understanding which evolutionary pathways could explain the population of JWST-discovered BHs. We present new high-resolution JWST NIRSpec/IFU observations covering the rest-frame optical emission lines of a Little Red Dot (LRD) at $z=3.55$, known as The Cliff, from the `Red Unknowns: Bright Infrared Extragalactic Survey' (RUBIES). We find evidence for low metallicity ($Z=0.017\pm0.004 \ Z_\odot$) based on the low narrow-line [OIII]$\lambda5007$/H$β$ ratio, supported by the non-detection of low-ionisation emission lines such as [OII]$λ\lambda3727,3729$ and [NII]$λ\lambda6548,6583$. We find that the observed properties of The Cliff, including its overmassive BH, can be reproduced by some simulations of black hole growth and evolution down to $z\sim3.5$. However, these simulation runs require high seed masses ($10^4 - 10^5\ M_\odot$) and appear as rarely in the simulation volume as in the RUBIES survey volume over redshifts $3<z<4$, highlighting the unusual nature of The Cliff. Future simulations and numerical models will help to uncover how such a metal poor system managed to develop a massive black hole and persist to such low redshift.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现早期宇宙存在大量性质异常的大质量黑洞，通过分析一个名为"The Cliff"的LRD天体，发现其低金属丰度环境支持大质量黑洞种子模型，但需要罕见的高种子质量才能解释观测特性。
AI.motivation: JWST揭示了早期宇宙中存在大量性质异常的大质量黑洞，这些黑洞与低红移活动星系核明显不同。为了理解这些黑洞的形成和演化路径，需要将黑洞环境的气相金属丰度与种子质量联系起来。
AI.method: 使用JWST NIRSpec/IFU对红移z=3.55的"The Cliff"LRD天体进行高分辨率观测，覆盖了静止光学发射线。通过分析窄线[OIII]λ5007/Hβ比值，以及低电离发射线如[OII]和[NII]的非探测，确定金属丰度。
AI.result: 发现The Cliff具有低金属丰度（Z=0.017±0.004 Z⊙），基于低窄线[OIII]/Hβ比值。观测特性可以通过某些黑洞增长演化模拟重现，但需要高种子质量（10^4-10^5 M⊙），且这种模拟在体积中出现频率与RUBIES巡天中观测到的频率相似，表明The Cliff的罕见性。
AI.conclusion: The Cliff的低金属丰度环境支持大质量黑洞种子模型，但需要罕见的高种子质量才能解释其观测特性。未来模拟和数值模型将有助于揭示这种金属贫乏系统如何发展出大质量黑洞并持续到如此低红移。

title: The Hubble sequence in JWST CEERS from unbiased galaxy morphologies
comment: 18 pages, 4 appendices; submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary:
Whether the "Hubble sequence" of galaxy morphologies exists up to z~4 is still disputed, and one of the challenges is characterizing galaxy structure consistently across a wide range of redshifts. To enable a fair comparison across cosmic time, we constructed "absolute" images of galaxies spanning 0.15<z<4.5 and 8<log $M_{\star}$<11 from HST CANDELS and JWST CEERS surveys, by matching the effective resolution and surface brightness limit of galaxies, accounting for cosmological dimming and evolution in size and mass-to-light ratio. We measured the structural parameters of 2825 galaxies and used the UMAP technique to study the evolution of the morphological phase space.
  We find a continuous sequence spanning late-type to early-type galaxies, with no redshift gradient - indicating that a Hubble-like sequence is established by z~4. We show that our approach recovers a cleaner separation between early- and late-type galaxies than visual classifications. By tracing progenitors using empirical mass assembly histories, we find that progenitors of low-mass galaxies are predominantly star-forming disks at all epochs. Progenitors of massive galaxies follow two distinct paths: a stable star-forming disk population with little structural evolution, and an early-type population that builds up rapidly from irregular progenitors and quenches within a few Gyr, consistent with a compaction-driven quenching scenario.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过匹配不同红移星系的有效分辨率和表面亮度限制，构建了"绝对"星系图像，发现哈勃序列在z~4时已基本形成，并揭示了不同质量星系的结构演化路径。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解决星系形态"哈勃序列"是否在z~4时已存在的问题，挑战在于如何在不同红移范围内一致地描述星系结构，实现跨宇宙时间的公平比较。
AI.method: 利用HST CANDELS和JWST CEERS巡天数据，构建了0.15<z<4.5、8<log M⋆<11范围内星系的"绝对"图像，匹配有效分辨率和表面亮度限制，考虑宇宙学暗化、尺寸和质量-光比演化。测量了2825个星系的结构参数，使用UMAP技术研究形态相空间的演化。
AI.result: 发现从晚型到早型星系的连续序列，无红移梯度，表明哈勃序列在z~4时已建立。该方法比视觉分类能更清晰地区分早型和晚型星系。低质量星系的前身在所有时期主要是恒星形成盘；大质量星系前身有两条路径：稳定的恒星形成盘种群（结构演化小）和早型种群（从不规则前身快速形成并在几Gyr内淬灭，符合压实驱动的淬灭情景）。
AI.conclusion: 哈勃序列在z~4时已基本形成，星系形态演化存在质量依赖的路径：低质量星系保持盘状结构，大质量星系通过压实驱动的淬灭快速形成早型星系。

title: Photoionization modelling of circumstellar nebulae using irregular grains
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables; accepted to MNRAS
summary: We study the effects of using the optical properties of irregular hexahedral grains in photoionization models of circumstellar nebulae around evolved stars. Dust opacities for the irregular grains were obtained from the scattering properties available in the TAMUdust2020 database and these were implemented in the spectral synthesis code cloudy. A sample of photoionization models that use opacities from both spherical and irregular hexahedral grains across a standard MRN size distribution (0.005 to 0.25 um) was produced. We consider the optical properties of graphite, amorphous carbon and silicate dust grains and find that differences between the model nebula continua calculated using spherical and irregular dust grains increase with the grain size, especially for graphite. In particular, we find that the luminosities at the infrared peak for the hexahedral grain models can be up to 60% higher than those from the equivalent spherical grain models for the largest grains. This result suggests that traditional spherical grain assumptions may lead to an overestimate of the dust mass in photoionized nebulae.

AI.tldr: 研究不规则六面体尘埃颗粒的光学特性对演化星周围星云光致电离模型的影响，发现与传统球形颗粒假设相比，不规则颗粒会导致红外峰值光度显著增加，可能影响尘埃质量估算。
AI.motivation: 传统光致电离模型通常假设尘埃颗粒为球形，但实际星际尘埃颗粒具有不规则形状。本研究旨在探究使用不规则六面体颗粒的光学特性对星云模型结果的影响，特别是对尘埃质量估算的潜在偏差。
AI.method: 从TAMUdust2020数据库获取不规则六面体颗粒的散射特性，计算其尘埃不透明度，并将其集成到光谱合成代码cloudy中。构建一组光致电离模型，比较球形和不规则六面体颗粒在标准MRN尺寸分布（0.005-0.25微米）下的石墨、无定形碳和硅酸盐尘埃颗粒的光学特性差异。
AI.result: 球形和不规则颗粒模型计算的星云连续谱差异随颗粒尺寸增大而增加，特别是石墨颗粒。对于最大颗粒，六面体颗粒模型的红外峰值光度可比等效球形颗粒模型高出60%。
AI.conclusion: 传统球形颗粒假设可能导致对光致电离星云中尘埃质量的高估。不规则颗粒的光学特性对模型结果有显著影响，特别是在红外波段，这对精确估算星际尘埃质量具有重要意义。

title: Beyond Mass and Multiscale Environments: What Shapes Low Surface Brightness Galaxies? Evidence from MaNGA
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication in the Apj
summary: The origin of low surface brightness (LSB) galaxies remains a key open question in galaxy formation, reflecting the balance internal mechanisms and environmental influence. Using MaNGA integral-field spectroscopy, we investigate whether LSB and high surface brightness (HSB) galaxies of comparable stellar mass ($9 < \log M_\ast < 10$) occupy distinct environments or differ primarily through internal evolution. Our late-type sample comprises 113 central and 29 satellite LSB galaxies, and 374 central and 142 satellite HSB galaxies. We characterize environments on scales from 100 kpc to 10 Mpc, analyzing radial profiles of stellar mass surface density ($Σ_\ast$), star formation activity, and gas-phase metallicity. Central LSB and HSB galaxies inhabit similarly low-density large-scale ($>$200 kpc) environments, but LSB galaxies are more isolated on small scales ($\sim$100 kpc). Even after matching in stellar mass and environment, LSB galaxies show systematically lower $Σ_\ast$, $Σ_{SFR}$, and metallicities, often hosting diffuse, weakly star-forming bulges embedded in extended disks. These results indicate that LSB structure and star formation are not primarily governed by large-scale environment or halo mass. While secondary halo properties such as spin, concentration, or gas accretion history are often invoked, their environmental dependence appears weak. Instead, LSB-HSB differences for centrals likely reflect divergent assembly or interaction histories and internal processes -- such as angular momentum-driven disk evolution or inefficient gas conversion -- largely decoupled from large-scale environment. Nonetheless, environment still influences the observed star formation and chemical differences between central and satellite LSB galaxies.

AI.tldr: 低表面亮度星系与高表面亮度星系在相同恒星质量下，环境差异主要体现在小尺度隔离性，而非大尺度环境或晕质量，其结构差异主要源于内部演化过程。
AI.motivation: 研究低表面亮度星系的起源，探索其形成是主要受内部机制还是环境影响，解决星系形成中的关键开放性问题。
AI.method: 使用MaNGA积分场光谱观测，比较113个中心LSB、29个卫星LSB、374个中心HSB和142个卫星HSB星系，分析从100 kpc到10 Mpc不同尺度的环境，研究恒星质量面密度、恒星形成活动和气体相金属丰度的径向分布。
AI.result: 中心LSB和HSB星系在大尺度环境（>200 kpc）相似，但LSB星系在小尺度（~100 kpc）更孤立；即使匹配恒星质量和环境，LSB星系仍显示较低的面密度、恒星形成率和金属丰度，通常具有弥散、弱恒星形成的核球嵌入延展盘。
AI.conclusion: LSB星系的结构和恒星形成主要不受大尺度环境或晕质量控制，而是源于不同的组装历史、相互作用历史和内部过程（如角动量驱动的盘演化或低效气体转化），这些过程与大尺度环境基本解耦，但环境仍影响中心与卫星LSB星系间的恒星形成和化学差异。

title: The missing ultra-faint satellites of the Milky Way
summary: We combine the highest resolution N-body simulation of a $\sim 10^{12}\, M_\odot$ $Λ$CDM halo (Aquarius-A) with the {\sc GALFORM} galaxy formation semianalytic model to study the full satellite population expected in a MW-like galaxy. The model assumes that galaxies only form in subhalos whose peak circular velocity exceeds the H-cooling threshold, all of which are well resolved in the simulation. The number of luminous subhalos ever accreted into the main halo is thus well defined, and implies that the total number of MW satellites, down to arbitrarily low luminosity, should not exceed a few hundred. The model tracks satellites even after their halos cease to be resolved ("orphan" galaxies), and includes a novel treatment of dark matter and stellar tidal stripping which takes into account that all $Λ$CDM subhalos survive until the present because of their cuspy inner density profiles. After accounting for tides, our results match well the massive end of the observed MW satellite mass function and predict that a large number of ultra-faint dwarfs are missing from the current MW satellite census. The missing UFDs are predicted to avoid the innermost regions of the host, and to have properties that overlap with those of the many ultra-faint compact MW satellites (UFCSs) discovered recently, with properties intermediate between globular clusters and dwarf galaxies. Our results suggest that many UFCS systems are dark matter-dominated dwarfs with velocity dispersions between $1-3$km/s, which have survived disruption because they reside in the dense cusp of $Λ$CDM subhalos. UFCSs should have mean densities of order $10^{10}$-$10^{11}\,M_\odot/$kpc$^3$, higher than those of more extended ultra-faint systems. If confirmed, our results would provide support for the cuspy nature of $Λ$CDM dark matter halos and for the hydrogen-cooling threshold for galaxy formation.

AI.tldr: 通过结合高分辨率N体模拟和星系形成半解析模型，研究银河系卫星星系种群，预测存在大量尚未发现的超暗弱矮星系，这些星系具有高密度特征，支持ΛCDM暗物质晕的尖核结构和氢冷却阈值假设。
AI.motivation: 研究银河系卫星星系的完整种群，解决观测到的卫星星系数量与ΛCDM宇宙学模型预测之间的差异，特别是解释超暗弱矮星系的缺失问题。
AI.method: 结合Aquarius-A高分辨率N体模拟（模拟~10¹² M⊙的ΛCDM暗物质晕）和GALFORM星系形成半解析模型，追踪所有卫星星系（包括"孤儿"星系），采用新的暗物质和恒星潮汐剥离处理方法，考虑ΛCDM子晕的尖核密度剖面。
AI.result: 模型成功匹配观测到的银河系卫星星系质量函数的高质量端，预测存在大量尚未发现的超暗弱矮星系（UFDs），这些星系避免宿主星系最内区，性质介于球状星团和矮星系之间，具有高密度特征（10¹⁰-10¹¹ M⊙/kpc³）。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持ΛCDM暗物质晕的尖核性质，验证了星系形成的氢冷却阈值假设，预测的超暗弱致密卫星星系（UFCSs）可能是暗物质主导的矮星系，其高密度特征源于ΛCDM子晕的尖核结构。

title: Bypassed Core Formation in Milky Way-Mass SIDM Halos: Implications for the Local Group Past-Pericenter Scenario
summary: We consider a scenario in which the Milky Way (MW) and M31 have had a previous pericentric passage, and investigate its compatibility with self-interacting dark matter (SIDM). Using initial conditions sampled from Local Group (LG) analogues in the IllustrisTNG simulation, we perform controlled re-simulations of the MW-M31 orbit, evolving the system under both standard cold dark matter (CDM) and various SIDM cross-sections. We find that the deep baryonic potential of the MW preconditions the halo's thermal structure, establishing an initial negative temperature gradient. This drives SIDM halos to bypass the standard core-formation phase and enter immediate core-collapse, resulting in monotonically increasing central densities. In full orbital simulations, the compact stellar component (disk/bulge) of the MW analog remains robust against tidal disruption for pericenter distances as close as $r_{\rm peri}\lesssim20$ kpc during an encounter at cosmic time $\sim8$ Gyr. The diffuse stellar halo is comparatively more susceptible, facing disruption for $r_{\rm peri}\lesssim100$ kpc. Our results demonstrate a dichotomy in structural evolution: the compact disk/bulge is sensitive to intrinsic SIDM thermodynamics but dynamically robust against the pericenter encounter, whereas the diffuse stellar halo is largely independent of the specific SIDM model but more vulnerable to orbital tidal disruptions.

AI.tldr: 研究银河系与M31星系可能存在的早期近心点相遇，探讨自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）对此场景的兼容性，发现SIDM会导致暗物质晕核心坍缩而非形成核心，星系盘/核球对SIDM热力学敏感但对潮汐扰动稳定，而弥散恒星晕则相反。
AI.motivation: 探索银河系和M31星系在早期可能发生过近心点相遇的假设场景，研究这种轨道历史与自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）模型的兼容性，了解SIDM如何影响星系结构演化及其对潮汐扰动的响应。
AI.method: 从IllustrisTNG模拟中选取局部星系群类似体作为初始条件，对银河系-M31轨道进行受控重模拟，在标准冷暗物质（CDM）和不同SIDM截面下演化系统，分析暗物质晕热结构、核心形成/坍缩过程以及恒星成分对潮汐扰动的响应。
AI.result: 银河系深重子势预调了暗物质晕的热结构，建立初始负温度梯度，导致SIDM晕绕过标准核心形成阶段直接进入核心坍缩，中心密度单调增加。在轨道模拟中，银河系类似体的致密恒星成分（盘/核球）在宇宙时间约80亿年、近心点距离小于20kpc的相遇中仍能抵抗潮汐瓦解，而弥散恒星晕在近心点小于100kpc时更易被瓦解。
AI.conclusion: 星系结构演化呈现二分性：致密盘/核球对SIDM热力学敏感但对轨道潮汐扰动稳定；弥散恒星晕基本独立于具体SIDM模型但更易受轨道潮汐瓦解影响。这为通过观测约束银河系-M31轨道历史和暗物质性质提供了新视角。

title: Analytic compression of the effective field theory of the Lyman-alpha forest
summary: The 1D flux power spectrum ($P_{\mathrm{1D}}$) of the Ly$α$ forest provides an exceptionally high-resolution probe of structure formation down to small scales ($k\approx1-10~\text{$h~$Mpc$^{-1}$}$). These scales carry the imprints of massive neutrinos, warm dark matter, and the running of the primordial power spectrum spectral index. The effective field theory (EFT) is a promising perturbative approach to systematically and efficiently describe the Ly$α$ forest, but it faces challenges in its application to $P_{\mathrm{1D}}$, as many EFT parameters become degenerate when projected along the line of sight. In addition, this projection generates new stochastic terms from the integration over small-scale modes. In this work, we address these issues by compressing the EFT model space using the Fisher matrix formalism and linearizing the resulting compression directions, enabling analytic template marginalization and significantly reducing the computational cost of likelihood evaluation. We use hydrodynamical simulations to obtain a baseline estimate of EFT parameters, and use the DESI DR1 $P_{\mathrm{1D}}$ measurements to derive compression directions. We then marginalize over deviations from the baseline using these compression directions and forecast the constraining power of our formalism. We find that even in conservative scenarios where each data redshift bin requires its own set of EFT parameters, the cosmological constraints saturate with the linear bias, two leading-order 1D stochastic terms, and three principal combinations of the remaining EFT templates. In this case, our forecasted precision of the amplitude ($Δ^2_p$) and the logarithmic slope ($n_p$) of the linear matter power spectrum at the pivot scale ($k_p=0.7~\text{Mpc}^{-1}$) is $10\%$ and $2.0\%$, respectively, which is similar to emulator-based analyses that include observational data systematics.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种压缩有效场论（EFT）参数空间的方法，用于分析Lyα森林的一维通量功率谱，通过Fisher矩阵和线性化压缩方向，显著降低了似然评估的计算成本。
AI.motivation: Lyα森林的一维通量功率谱是探测小尺度结构形成的高分辨率探针，但有效场论方法在应用于该谱时面临参数简并性和投影产生新随机项的挑战。
AI.method: 使用Fisher矩阵形式压缩EFT模型空间，线性化压缩方向以实现解析模板边缘化；利用流体动力学模拟获取EFT参数基线估计，使用DESI DR1数据推导压缩方向。
AI.result: 即使在保守情况下（每个红移箱需要独立的EFT参数），宇宙学约束在线性偏差、两个主导阶1D随机项和三个主要EFT模板组合下达到饱和；预测线性物质功率谱振幅和斜率精度分别为10%和2.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低了计算成本，预测精度与包含观测数据系统误差的模拟器分析相当，为Lyα森林一维功率谱的EFT分析提供了高效框架。

title: An automated method for planetary nebula detection with SIGNALS: first applications to NGC 4214 and NGC 4449
comment: 21 pages, 19 figures, Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: Utilising the optical imaging Fourier transform spectrograph SITELLE, the Star-formation, Ionized Gas and Nebular Abundances Legacy Survey (SIGNALS) is designed to study the connection between star-forming regions and their environments. Targeting $31$ local star-forming galaxies, its data products also lend themselves to planetary nebula (PN) surveys. We present here a new pipeline to find PNe using automated emission-line diagnostics and morphology tests, that is able to distinguish PNe from contaminants with an accuracy similar to that of past visual methods. We also perform thorough completeness tests using mock PNe inserted into the data cubes with full spectra. We apply these tools to a pilot sample of two dwarf irregular galaxies from the SIGNALS survey, NGC 4214 and NGC 4449, with other galaxies to follow. For these two galaxies, we identify $25$ PNe (including $6$ new discoveries) and $23$ PNe (including $13$ new discoveries), respectively, and calculate PN luminosity function distances of $3.09^{+0.25}_{-0.46}$ and $3.91^{+0.33}_{-0.52}$ Mpc, respectively, the latter consistent with previous estimates. We also calculate the bolometric PN specific frequency of our galaxies ($α_\mathrm{bol}$), as well as a newly defined $V$-band PN specific frequency ($α_\mathrm{V}$) based solely on the galaxies' total luminosities in that band.

AI.tldr: SIGNALS项目使用SITELLE光谱仪研究恒星形成区，开发了自动化行星状星云检测管道，在NGC 4214和NGC 4449星系中分别发现25个和23个行星状星云，并计算了距离和特定频率。
AI.motivation: 研究恒星形成区与其环境之间的联系，同时利用SIGNALS调查数据开发行星状星云检测方法，以更好地理解星系中的恒星形成和演化过程。
AI.method: 使用SITELLE傅里叶变换光谱仪进行光学成像，开发自动化管道通过发射线诊断和形态测试检测行星状星云，并进行完整性测试，将模拟行星状星云插入数据立方体进行验证。
AI.result: 在NGC 4214星系中识别出25个行星状星云（6个新发现），距离为3.09^{+0.25}_{-0.46} Mpc；在NGC 4449星系中识别出23个行星状星云（13个新发现），距离为3.91^{+0.33}_{-0.52} Mpc。计算了两种特定频率：α_bol和α_V。
AI.conclusion: 开发的自动化行星状星云检测管道具有与视觉方法相似的准确性，能够有效识别行星状星云并计算星系距离，为后续SIGNALS调查中更多星系的研究奠定了基础。

title: The Cosmic Web and Its Filaments: Neutrino Mass from Topology and Persistent Homology
comment: 32 pages, 14 figures, 1 table. Submitted to ApJS (23 Feb 2026); under review
summary: We apply discrete Morse theory, global topology, and persistent homology to characterize the impact of massive neutrinos on the multiscale cosmic web, focusing on filaments. The topology of the cosmic web is sensitive to neutrino imprints, and persistence diagrams provide more information than commonly used summary statistics by quantifying the longevity of topological features across densities. This scale-adaptive, parameter-free formalism is powerful, as massive neutrinos affect halos, walls, filaments, and voids in distinct ways. Within this framework, we simultaneously assess their impact on tracers and skeleton structures and capture their multiscale signals across cosmic time. Discrete Morse theory is also well suited for particle-based neutrino implementations, often affected by Poisson shot noise, as it preserves the salient features of the underlying smooth field. Using two independent sets of N-body simulations, we present filament statistics and persistence diagrams in massive-neutrino cosmologies. Our results show that neutrinos leave distinct imprints on filaments and skeleton connectivity, producing mass-dependent signatures most pronounced at high redshift (z~2) and detectable at the few-percent level for masses as small as $M_ν\sim 0.1$ eV. Filaments thus provide an ideal environment for isolating neutrino effects. We also compare two implementations of massive neutrinos to assess systematics. Our study establishes a promising avenue for leveraging cosmic web topology, persistent homology, and environment-based statistics to constrain or directly detect neutrino mass and infer the mass hierarchy - a long-standing challenge in particle physics and a major objective of ongoing and upcoming galaxy redshift surveys (e.g., DES, DESI, Euclid, Rubin-LSST).

AI.tldr: 该研究应用离散莫尔斯理论、全局拓扑和持久同调分析大质量中微子对宇宙网状结构（特别是纤维结构）的多尺度影响，发现中微子在纤维结构和骨架连通性上留下独特印记，为约束中微子质量和质量层级提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 中微子质量是粒子物理学中长期存在的挑战，传统宇宙学统计方法可能无法充分捕捉中微子对宇宙网状结构的多尺度影响。需要开发尺度自适应、无参数的形式体系来表征中微子对宇宙纤维、壁、空洞等不同结构的独特影响。
AI.method: 采用离散莫尔斯理论、全局拓扑分析和持久同调方法，分析两组独立的N体模拟数据。持久图量化拓扑特征在不同密度下的持久性，离散莫尔斯理论特别适合处理粒子基中微子实现中的泊松噪声问题。同时比较两种大质量中微子实现方案以评估系统误差。
AI.result: 中微子在纤维结构和骨架连通性上留下独特印记，产生质量依赖的特征信号。这些信号在高红移（z~2）时最为明显，即使对于小至0.1 eV的质量也能在百分之几的水平上检测到。纤维结构为隔离中微子效应提供了理想环境。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙网状结构拓扑、持久同调和基于环境的统计为约束或直接探测中微子质量、推断质量层级提供了有前景的途径。该方法对当前和未来的星系红移巡天（如DES、DESI、Euclid、Rubin-LSST）具有重要意义。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 euclid 等主题/作者匹配。

title: Paschen Jumps in Little Red Dots: Evidence for Nebular Continua
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, submitted to A&A. Comments are welcome
summary: ''Little Red Dots'' (LRDs) are broad-line sources at high redshift, initially identified by their compact morphologies, red colours and prominent Balmer breaks. The origin of their optical-to-near-infrared continua is debated, with proposed explanations ranging from direct recombination emission to thermalised blackbodies from stellar-like atmospheres. Here we report evidence for Paschen jumps in a subset of LRDs, consistent with free-bound recombination to hydrogen $n=3$. The Paschen and Brackett continuum shapes across the sample are consistent with minimally reddened emission from low-temperature gas with $T_e\lesssim10\,000$ K, while the presence of Paschen jump signatures limits scenarios in which the emission is thermalised. Further, the extreme H$α$ equivalent widths and the tight observed correlation between H$α$ and the continuum follow naturally if both originate in recombination emission. This provides an observational upper limit on the contribution of any direct AGN accretion component and any stellar-atmosphere-like component, as well as on the fraction of line emission that can be thermalised as it traverses the cocoon. Ultimately, nebular radiative-transfer models provide a self-consistent explanation of the continuum, line strengths and line profiles without requiring multiple separately fitted components.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现高红移"小红点"星系中存在帕邢跳跃特征，表明其光学-近红外连续谱主要来自氢n=3自由复合辐射，而非热化黑体辐射，为理解这类天体的物理起源提供了关键观测证据。
AI.motivation: 高红移"小红点"星系的光学-近红外连续谱起源存在争议，有直接复合辐射和恒星大气热化黑体辐射两种解释。需要观测证据来区分这两种机制。
AI.method: 通过分析"小红点"样本的帕邢跳跃和布拉开特连续谱形状，结合Hα等值宽度与连续谱的紧密相关性，使用星云辐射转移模型进行自洽解释。
AI.result: 在部分"小红点"中检测到帕邢跳跃特征，连续谱形状与低红化、低温度气体（Te≲10,000 K）的自由复合辐射一致，Hα与连续谱的紧密相关性支持两者都来自复合辐射。
AI.conclusion: 观测证据支持"小红点"的连续谱主要来自氢复合辐射，限制了AGN吸积成分和恒星大气热化成分的贡献，星云辐射转移模型能够自洽解释连续谱、谱线强度和谱线轮廓。

title: Temperature asymmetry in the Milky Way's hot circumgalactic medium induced by the Magellanic Clouds
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS, 6 pages, 3 figures
summary: The Milky Way is surrounded by a hot diffuse circumgalactic medium (CGM) with temperatures of millions of degrees. Recent X-ray observations with the eROSITA satellite discovered a significant temperature asymmetry of this hot CGM, with the southern hemisphere being on average hotter than the northern one by a relative difference of $Δ T/T \approx 12\%$, where $T$ is averaged over the entire CGM. In this Letter, we investigate whether the passage of the Magellanic Clouds can be responsible for this asymmetry by means of a hydrodynamical/N-body simulation. In the simulation, the Magellanic Clouds induce a relative motion of the Milky Way's disc of up to 40 km/s. This motion leads to compression of the CGM gas in the southern hemisphere, resulting in an overall temperature increase in that region. We estimate a south-north temperature difference of $Δ T/T \approx 13-20\%$, consistent with the observations. We find that this temperature asymmetry is a recent phenomenon that began ~100 Myr ago.

AI.tldr: 通过流体动力学/N体模拟研究麦哲伦云通过是否导致银河系热环星系介质温度不对称，发现麦哲伦云引起银河系盘面相对运动，压缩南半球CGM气体，产生13-20%的温度差异，与观测一致。
AI.motivation: eROSITA卫星X射线观测发现银河系热环星系介质存在显著温度不对称，南半球比北半球平均温度高约12%，需要解释这种不对称现象的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用流体动力学/N体模拟研究麦哲伦云通过银河系的影响，模拟麦哲伦云引起的银河系盘面相对运动及其对环星系介质的压缩效应。
AI.result: 模拟显示麦哲伦云引起银河系盘面相对运动达40 km/s，导致南半球CGM气体压缩，产生13-20%的南北温度差异，与观测的12%一致；这种温度不对称是约1亿年前开始的近期现象。
AI.conclusion: 麦哲伦云的通过可以解释银河系热环星系介质的温度不对称现象，模拟结果与观测数据相符，表明这种不对称是相对较新的天体物理过程。
